     The Numbers Business Report

Star Wars Ep. III: Revenge of the Sith (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $414,378,291Details
International Box Office $488,513,692
Worldwide Box Office $902,891,983
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Years after the onset of the Clone Wars, the noble Jedi Knights lead a massive clone army into a galaxy-wide battle against the Separatists. When the sinister Sith unveil a thousand-year-old plot to rule the galaxy, the Republic crumbles and from its ashes rises the evil Galactic Empire. Jedi hero Anakin Skywalker is seduced by the dark side of the Force to become the Emperor's new apprentice -- Darth Vader. The Jedi are decimated, as Obi-Wan Kenobi and Jedi Master Yoda are forced into hiding. The only hope for the galaxy are Anakin's own offspring -- the twin children born in secrecy who will grow up to become heroes.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$108,435,841 (26.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.82 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:45.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$115,000,000 (worldwide box office is 7.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,661 opening theaters/3,663 max. theaters, 8.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $743,629,727

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 19th, 2005 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
April 25th, 2025 (Wide) by 20th Century Studios (25th Anniversary)
International Releases: May 18th, 2005 (Wide), released as Star Wars, épisode III : La Revanche des Sith (France)
May 18th, 2005 (Wide), released as Star wars: Episode III — La revanche des sith (Belgium)
May 18th, 2005 (Wide), released as Star Wars: Episode III — Die Rache der Sith (Austria)
May 18th, 2005 (Wide) (Netherlands)
May 19th, 2005 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
Video Release: November 1st, 2005 by Fox Home Entertainment, released as Star Wars - Episode III, Revenge of the Sith
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sci-fi violence and some intense images
Running Time: 139 minutes
Franchise: Star Wars

Filming location (city or town): Sydney, Australia
Filming location (country): Australia, England, Italy, Thailand, United Kingdom

Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Years after the onset of the Clone Wars, the noble Jedi Knights lead a massive clone army into a galaxy-wide battle against the Separatists. When the sinister Sith unveil a thousand-year-old plot to rule the galaxy, the Republic crumbles and from its ashes rises the evil Galactic Empire. Jedi hero Anakin Skywalker is seduced by the dark side of the Force to become the Emperor's new apprentice -- Darth Vader. The Jedi are decimated, as Obi-Wan Kenobi and Jedi Master Yoda are forced into hiding. The only hope for the galaxy are Anakin's own offspring -- the twin children born in secrecy who will grow up to become heroes.

Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $743,629,727
